name: Matrimony.com Limited
summary: Matrimony.com Limited online matchmaking services on internet and mobile platforms in India and internationally. The company operates through Matchmaking Services and Marriage Services segments. The company operates matrimonial sites, including BharatMatrimony.com, BengaliMatrimony.com, GujaratiMatrimony.com, HindiMatrimony.com, KannadaMatrimony.com, KeralaMatrimony.com, MarathiMatrimony.com, MarwadiMatrimony.com, OriyaMatrimony.com, PunjabiMatrimony.com, TamilMatrimony.com, TeluguMatrimony.com, UrduMatrimony.com, AssameseMatrimony.com, ParsiMatrimony.com, and SindhiMatrimony.com. It also operates regional matrimonial sites through MuslimMatrimony.com, ChristianMatrimony.com, SikhMatrimony.com, JainMatrimony.com, and BuddhistMatrimony.com; and offers social services through BharatBloodBank.com, BharatEyeBank.org, AbilityMatrimony.com, and HappyMarriages.com. In addition, the company operates community based sites, such as CommunityMatrimony.com; and exclusive matrimonial sites comprising EliteMatrimony.com, DivorceeMatrimony.com, ManglikMatrimony.com, and DefenceMatrimony.com. Further, it operates Matrimonybazar.com and Matrimonymandap.com to provide related marriage services that include wedding planners, venues, cards, and caterers, as well as mandap services. It operates approximately 148 retail outlets. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Chennai, India.
